## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill update
- [ ] Awesome resource
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling or validation

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/validate-skills.py`.
- [ ] New or changed skills have `name` and `description` frontmatter.
- [ ] Skill descriptions start with `Use when`.
- [ ] Examples contain no secrets, private data, or internal-only links.
- [ ] README or docs are updated if the public surface changed.

## Notes

Add review context, trade-offs, or follow-up work.
